What entities are present on the table and what actions is the person performing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a yellow jacket with striped cuffs holds white fluffy cotton material above a dark brown table. A yellow rectangular sponge sits centrally on the surface with a thin metal needle inserted vertically into it. A dark blue ceramic mug rests on the left side of the table. The individual pulls the cotton apart and rubs it against the porous sponge surface.
